## Skills

| Category | Details |
|:---------|:--------|
| Languages | Italian (native), English (C1, IELTS 7.0), Spanish (basic) |
| Programming | R, Python, MATLAB, C |
| Markup | LaTeX, Quarto/RMarkdown |
| Tools | git, SLURM, High Performance Scientific Computing |
| Methods | causal inference (g-methods, negative controls, trial emulation, Mendelian randomization), longitudinal/panel data analysis, survival analysis, multi-omic integration |
